inputs.label: Milk Price per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Current market price of raw milk per liter. Source: USDA dairy market news.

inputs.label: Milk Volume per Day
inputs.businessContext: Daily milk production volume. Standard industry metric for dairy farms.

inputs.label: Fat Content (%)
inputs.businessContext: Milk fat percentage, affects pricing and product yield. Typical range 3-5%.

inputs.label: Protein Content (%)
inputs.businessContext: Milk protein percentage, important for cheese yield. Typical range 3-4%.

inputs.label: Somatic Cell Count (SCC)
inputs.businessContext: Indicator of udder health and milk quality. Thresholds per ISO 13366-1: <200k good, >400k penalty.

inputs.label: Total Bacterial Count (TBC)
inputs.businessContext: Hygiene indicator. EU standard <100k cfu/mL. High counts reduce shelf life.

inputs.label: Feed Cost per Cow per Day
inputs.businessContext: Daily feed cost per cow. Major variable cost in dairy operations.

inputs.label: Number of Cows
inputs.businessContext: Total milking cows in herd. Determines scale.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage for farm labor. Includes benefits.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Total daily labor hours for milking and farm operations.

inputs.label: Energy Consumption per Day
inputs.businessContext: Daily electricity usage for milking, cooling, etc.

inputs.label: Water Cost per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Cost of water per liter. Includes treatment.

inputs.label: Water Usage per Day
inputs.businessContext: Daily water consumption for cleaning and cows.

inputs.label: Veterinary Cost per Cow per Year
inputs.businessContext: Annual veterinary expenses per cow. Health management.

inputs.label: Replacement Cost per Cow
inputs.businessContext: Cost to purchase a replacement heifer.

inputs.label: Milk Price Premium per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Additional price for quality premiums (e.g., organic, A2).

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment.

thresholds.somaticCellCount: if somaticCellCount > 400000 then 'High SCC: milk quality penalty likely'
thresholds.totalBacterialCount: if totalBacterialCount > 100000 then 'High TBC: hygiene issue, shelf life reduced'
thresholds.mortalityRatePercent: if mortalityRatePercent > 5 then 'High mortality: investigate health management'
thresholds.fatContentPercent: if fatContentPercent < 3.0 then 'Low fat: may affect product yield'
thresholds.proteinContentPercent: if proteinContentPercent < 3.0 then 'Low protein: cheese yield impacted'

formulas.dailyTotalCost: dailyFeedCost + dailyLaborCost + dailyEnergyCost + dailyWaterCost + dailyVetCost + dailyReplacementCost

hiddenLossDrivers: if somaticCellCount > 400000 then 'High SCC: milk quality penalty likely'
if totalBacterialCount > 100000 then 'High TBC: hygiene issue, shelf life reduced'
if mortalityRatePercent > 5 then 'High mortality: investigate health management'
if fatContentPercent < 3.0 then 'Low fat: may affect product yield'
if proteinContentPercent < 3.0 then 'Low protein: cheese yield impacted'
suggestedActions: if somaticCellCount > 400000 then 'Improve milking hygiene and udder health management'
if totalBacterialCount > 100000 then 'Sanitize equipment and review cooling protocols'
if mortalityRatePercent > 5 then 'Review veterinary program and cow comfort'
if profitMargin < 0 then 'Reduce costs or increase milk price premium'
if costPerLiter > milkPricePerLiter then 'Focus on cost reduction or value-added products'
